query: SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, baseQuotationId, parentQuotationId, status, clientId FROM quotations WHERE versionNumber > 1 OR quotationNumber LIKE '%v2%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%V2%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%V3%' ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, baseQuotationId, parentQuotationId, status, clientId FROM quotations WHERE versionNumber > 1 OR quotationNumber LIKE '%v2%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%V2%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%V3%' ORDER BY id;
